title: Trump’s New $100k H-1B Fee!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

A new policy introduces a staggering $100,000 fee for all new H-1B petitions, drastically impacting Indian professionals dreaming of working in the US. But here's the silver lining: Could this be the end of "brain drain," bringing our best talent back to supercharge India's own tech ecosystem? A setback or a blessing in disguise for India?
